_comment: Index of synthetic KB articles for kb_lookup. No real data. `keywords` drive naive matching; body lives in <id>.md.

articles.title: Reset a forgotten password (self-service + agent-assisted)
articles.summary: Steps to reset a user password once identity is verified; eligible for auto-resolution for verified requesters.

articles.title: MFA device lost or replaced
articles.summary: Re-enroll multi-factor authentication when a user loses or replaces their device.

articles.title: VPN slow or dropping connection
articles.summary: Troubleshooting for degraded VPN performance; workaround steps before routing to network-ops.

articles.title: Shared drive or file share unreachable
articles.summary: Diagnose access to shared network storage for one user vs a whole team.

articles.title: Laptop won't power on or won't charge
articles.summary: Hardware triage for a non-booting or non-charging laptop; when to dispatch desktop-support.

articles.title: Application crashes or won't launch
articles.summary: General software troubleshooting: cache, reinstall, version check before routing to app-support.

articles.title: Suspected phishing or account compromise
articles.summary: Do NOT auto-resolve. Preserve evidence and escalate to security-incident immediately.
